entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Forage pearl millet (Pennisetum glaucum) evaluated for disease resistance

entities.name: SCLEROSPORA GRAMINICOLA
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes downy mildew in pearl millet

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of pearl millet genotypes to resist infection by Sclerospora graminicola

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW
entities.description: A disease caused by the pathogen Sclerospora graminicola

entities.name: INFECTOR ROW SYSTEM
entities.description: A field nursery technique used to evaluate resistance to downy mildew

entities.name: AVERAGE LINKAGE CLUSTER ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to group genotypes based on their resistance levels

entities.name: EUCLIDIAN DISTANCES
entities.description: A distance metric used within the average linkage cluster analysis
